nodes.goal: Load OSM surface, parks, water, and roads layers for Niterói from Overpass.

nodes.content:
import requests

# Niterói land surface temperature raster (24 yearly bands, 2001–2024).
# Returned as a single-row GeoDataFrame so the path travels through the dataflow.
import geopandas as gpd
from shapely.geometry import Point

url = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/urban-toolkit/autark/main/usecases/public/data/niteroi_lst_verao_2001_2024.tif'

gdf = gpd.GeoDataFrame(
    {'geotiff_url': [url], 'band_count': [24]},
    geometry=[Point(0, 0)],
    crs='EPSG:4326',
)
return gdf
nodes.goal: Reference the LST GeoTIFF (2001–2024) for Niterói. Body cells carry only the URL; loading happens server-side in autk-db.
Per-road OLS regression of yearly LST values via GPU shader.
Render Niterói layers with roads thematically colored by warming slope.
Brushable scatterplot of road regression results.
